properties.name: call-active
properties.description: Controls the active state of the call

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Controls the disabled state of the dial pad

properties.name: end-call-button-label
properties.description: Controls the end call button label

properties.name: helper-text
properties.description: Controls the helper text displayed below the phone input element

properties.name: no-call
properties.description: Removes the call button and functionality

properties.name: pattern
properties.description: Regular expression to validate the value of the input element

properties.name: value
properties.description: Value of the phone input element

properties.name: autofocus
properties.description: Indicates that an element should be focused on page load, or when the Dialog that it is part of is displayed. When `no-input` attribute is specified, it will be the first digit button. Otherwise, the text field will be focused.`

events.name: input
events.description: Emitted when the text field value changes

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted when the text field value changes

events.name: blur
events.description: Emitted when the Dial Pad loses focus

events.name: focus
events.description: Emitted when the Dial Pad children receive focus

events.name: keypad-click
events.description: Emitted when a digit button is clicked

events.name: dial
events.description: Emitted when the call button is clicked

events.name: end-call
events.description: Emitted when the end call button is clicked

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Moves focus into the Dial Pad. If `no-input` attribute is specified, it will be the first digit button. Otherwise, the input field will be focused.
